articles.title: Livestream: Kelsey Fitzsimmons’s trial gets underway
articles.description:
Fitzsimmons, a North Andover police officer, was shot by a colleague in her home last summer. She's pleaded not guilty to a charge of assault with a dangerous weapon.

The post Livestream: Kelsey Fitzsimmons’s trial gets underway appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kelsey Fitzsimmons's trial for assault with a dangerous weapon begins in Boston.
Fitzsimmons, a North Andover police officer, was shot by a colleague last summer.
The trial's outcome may influence local police-community relations and officer accountability.

articles.title: How Dropkick Murphys’ Jeff DaRosa found himself on the road to the Boston Marathon
articles.description:
After getting sober, the musician turned to running and found structure off the road.

The post How Dropkick Murphys’ Jeff DaRosa found himself on the road to the Boston Marathon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jeff DaRosa of Dropkick Murphys is training for the Boston Marathon after getting sober.
He turned to running as a way to find structure and stability in his life.
DaRosa's journey highlights the positive impact of sports on recovery for Boston residents.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum, frustrated by shooting slump, is showing both rust and flashes
articles.description:
"I wouldn't say it's a normal slump because this is the first time I went through something like this. It's just been a long time."

The post Jayson Tatum, frustrated by shooting slump, is showing both rust and flashes appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum experiences shooting slump, impacting Celtics' performance this season.
Tatum acknowledges it's his first significant slump since entering the NBA.
Frustration may affect team morale as Celtics aim for playoff success.

articles.title: Pilot and copilot killed in collision between jet and fire truck at New York’s LaGuardia Airport
articles.description:
There were 72 passengers and four crew members aboard the aircraft, a Jazz Aviation flight operating on behalf of Air Canada, according to a statement from the airline.

The post Pilot and copilot killed in collision between jet and fire truck at New York’s LaGuardia Airport appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pilot and copilot of Jazz Aviation flight killed in LaGuardia collision.
72 passengers and four crew members were aboard the Air Canada flight.
Boston travelers may face delays as investigations impact air traffic.

articles.title: Bones Hyland, short-handed Timberwolves beat ice-cold Celtics: 6 takeaways
articles.description:
“I wanted to be perfect and First Team All-NBA Jayson, but it’s going to take time. I didn't rush the rehab process, so I can't rush this. It’s all going to work out.”

The post Bones Hyland, short-handed Timberwolves beat ice-cold Celtics: 6 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics lost to Timberwolves, struggling with shooting performance throughout the game.
Jayson Tatum emphasized the importance of patience in his recovery process.
This loss raises concerns for Boston fans about the team's playoff readiness.
